common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted occupancy sensors.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted occupancy sensors to trigger on.

is_detected.description: Tests if one or more occupancy sensors are detecting occupancy.
is_detected.name: Occupancy is detected

is_not_detected.description: Tests if one or more occupancy sensors are not detecting occupancy.
is_not_detected.name: Occupancy is not detected

cleared.description: Triggers after one or more occupancy sensors stop detecting occupancy.
cleared.name: Occupancy cleared

detected.description: Triggers after one or more occupancy sensors start detecting occupancy.
detected.name: Occupancy detected
